title: kohleria × pulchra
intro: Kohleria × pulchra, also known as the 'Pulchra Orchid', is a hybrid plant species within the family Gesneriaceae, resulting from the cross between Kohleria walteri and Kohleria pimponioides. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Kohleria × pulchra include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Kohleria × pulchra often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
